from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone

from trading.auto_trader import select_candidate_refs
from trading.query_store import Alert, QueryStore


def test_id_first_mode_merges_lanes_under_one_global_cap():
    store = QueryStore([
        Alert(9, 7, None),
        Alert(2, 7, None),
        Alert(7, None, None),
        Alert(1, None, None),
    ])
    refs = select_candidate_refs(store, 7, limit=3, recent_first=False)
    assert [row_id for row_id, _at in refs] == [1, 2, 7]
    assert len(store.calls) == 2


def test_each_lane_gets_local_capacity_before_global_limit():
    now = datetime(2026, 6, 4, 1, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
    system = [Alert(100 + index, None, now + timedelta(seconds=index)) for index in range(20)]
    user = [Alert(5, 7, now + timedelta(seconds=30))]
    store = QueryStore([*system, *user])
    refs = select_candidate_refs(store, 7, limit=1, recent_first=True)
    assert refs == [(5, user[0].alerted_at)]
    assert [call["limit"] for call in store.calls] == [1, 1]


def test_duplicate_identity_across_lanes_is_returned_once():
    now = datetime(2026, 6, 4, 1, 0)
    store = QueryStore([Alert(4, 7, now), Alert(4, None, now), Alert(5, None, now - timedelta(seconds=1))])
    refs = select_candidate_refs(store, 7, limit=3, recent_first=True)
    assert [row_id for row_id, _at in refs] == [4, 5]


def test_mixed_naive_and_aware_timestamps_have_stable_recency_order():
    naive = datetime(2026, 6, 4, 1, 0)
    aware = datetime(2026, 6, 4, 1, 0, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
    store = QueryStore([Alert(1, 7, naive), Alert(2, None, aware)])
    refs = select_candidate_refs(store, 7, limit=2, recent_first=True)
    assert [row_id for row_id, _at in refs] == [2, 1]
